purpose: Group of overlapping Avatars showing multiple users or entities. Final Avatar can be a +N counter for overflow.
whenToUse: List of users assigned to a task
whenNotToUse: When all users must be individually identifiable — use a list
For non-user entities use Tag or ObjectMarker
doRules: Cap visible avatars at 5; show +N for overflow
Each avatar should have tooltip with name
dontRules: Do not show more than 5 visible avatars + counter
Do not use AvatarGroup as a primary action surface
Do not omit the overflow counter

layoutGuidance.placement: Place AvatarGroup inside a compatible container (DynamicPageHeader, ObjectPageLayout, Panel).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for object display.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
